title: ちょっぴりお騒がせ☆風水ウマ娘、登場

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(It happened when I was little. I got injured while running with my
friends.)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(I was put on doctor's orders, totally banned from moving. All I could
do was sleep for aaages. But during one of those rests...)

text_block_list.name: Young Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Where... am I? I'm underwater... Did I go swimming in a river... and get
carried away by the current?

text_block_list.name: Young Rickey
text_block_list.text: What if I can't get out? What if I drown at the bottom of the river?!
Rickey. Listen to me.

text_block_list.name: Young Rickey
text_block_list.text: Huh? Who's there?
Do not fear misfortune. Learn the way of fortune.
Understand? Learn how to bring about fortune.

text_block_list.name: Young Rickey
text_block_list.text: Is that you... Dragon God?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(Yes, that was the day I opened my eyes to feng shui, and I've been
hooked ever since. And now...)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Fool! Proposal dismissed.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Please reconsider, Air Groove! Don't you want every student to feel
stronger and happier? Then...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Putting feng shui in the curriculum is a no-brainer! Rickey! ☆ Lucky! ☆
Everyone's happy!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Not happening. What we need is study and training, not superstition.
Now get out!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hey, wait! Why won't she understand? Feng shui isn't a superstition.
There's nothing to be so distrustful about!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I'm passing through the corridor, I stumble right into a bizarre
scene—a student was kicked out of the student office for pushing
feng shui too hard. She turns to me...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Oh, you there. You must be a trainer, right?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Would you like to do some feng shui with me? You're interested,
right? Right? Right?!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
No, I'm sure you could do with some more good luck! ☆ Now, come
with me. I'll teach you everything—starting from the basics! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I suddenly find myself being dragged outside...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
You know how people say they're lucky or unlucky? And when
something goes wrong, they blame it on bad luck?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Well, the truth is, they don't have bad luck. They just don't
understand auspicious directions and how the five elements compete,
or how to use those things to their advantage. For example...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
When you redecorate your room, doesn't it feel like the air gets
fresher as well? That's because of the way you changed your furniture.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's because you've both reduced the overhead pressure you feel
while sleeping and blocked the channels where wealth could escape!
You just didn't know it!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So? Aren't you impressed? Now that you've heard my explanation, I
bet you can't wait to know more!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: What? Even after I explained it so well?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Was it too complicated? If only there was a quick and easy way
to explain the appeal of feng shui...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There was nothing wrong with her explanation, but it just didn't sound
like the kind of thing I should jump into believing right away.
choice_data_list: Well, all the best with that, but I've got to go.
Well, all the best with that, but I've got to go.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Ah, wait! Don't go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's best not to get too involved with her. As I turn to leave...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Tomorrow's tryouts!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Come watch me at tomorrow's tryouts! I'll show you the power of feng
shui there! Once you see it, you'll believe it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Copano Rickey waves her hands vigorously at me as I walk away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Aha, I knew you'd come watch! You acted all disinterested, but deep
down, you were curious about feng shui, weren't you?
choice_data_list: Uh, no, can't say I was...
Uh, no, can't say I was...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The tryouts are important races. Whether or not Copano Rickey was
running, there are other students who I would've come to watch.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
My race is coming up soon. In the meantime, why don't you get a nice,
hot cup of oolong tea to soothe the soul? ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
You're going to need it! Once you see me running with the power of
feng shui, your heart might start pounding out of your chest! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Putting aside whether feng shui is real or not, it seems to be Copano
Rickey's driving force.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And seeing how she's this pumped up, I wouldn't be surprised if she
puts on a great showing. It's nice to see a rookie with spirit.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Huh? Hold on. The power spot at this training track is...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The atmosphere feels a bit off. I wonder... has the flow of qi
changed?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
What was it that moved, the visible landform? Or the invisible
compass?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
In any case, something's about to happen in the next race! I have a
bad feeling about it!
choice_data_list: ...Could it all be in your head?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: No, it's not just in my head. The girls about to race look uneasy too.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: What's causing this? Where is it stemming from?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her face suddenly turns glum. She looks so serious that it's hard to
brush it off as superstition.
